description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a structured silhouette, covered in a maroon fabric adorned with an intricate white geometric pattern reminiscent of traditional embroidery. The front flap is secured by a gold-toned clasp and displays a small rectangular label reading 'Handcrafted' in the center. The bag is equipped with a single, medium-length brown leather strap attached by gold hardware, suitable for carrying by hand or over the shoulder. The back of the bag continues the geometric pattern uninterrupted, while the sides reveal the bag's slim profile. The overall design is elegant and artisanal, blending modern structure with classic decorative motifs.
description: A maroon rectangular handbag with a white geometric embroidered pattern, gold clasp, and a brown leather strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned flap, gold clasp, and central 'Handcrafted' label.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the attachment of the brown leather strap with gold hardware.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the uninterrupted geometric pattern and the full length of the strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and strap attachment seen in view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular label on the front flap, centered, with the word 'Handcrafted' and additional text below.
attribute_strap_type: Single medium-length brown leather handle, non-adjustable, attached with gold hardware at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Gold-toned clasp located at the center of the front flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Intricate white geometric embroidery covering the exterior; gold hardware.
attribute_pattern: White geometric embroidered pattern on a maroon background.
